AI Strategy & Advisory

Stop Guessing.
Start Strategising.

Most organisations know AI matters. Very few know where to start — or how to make it pay. We fix that.

Book a Strategy Call WhatsApp
What's Included

Everything You Need to Lead with AI

01

AI Readiness Audit

A forensic review of your current technology, processes, people, and data infrastructure — mapped against where AI can deliver the highest impact.

02

Custom AI Roadmap

A phased, prioritised implementation plan built around your specific goals, budget, and timeline — with measurable milestones and ROI projections.

03

Board-Level Strategy

Executive-ready documentation and presentations that make AI investable and understandable at board level — with financial modelling and risk frameworks.

Is This For You?

This is for you if...

→

You're a CEO wrestling with AI direction — you know it's important but can't see a clear path to value.

→

Your leadership team is misaligned on AI priorities — everyone has a different opinion and nothing moves forward.

→

You've already tried AI tools but there's no strategy — isolated experiments with no joined-up thinking or ROI tracking.

→

You're preparing a business case for AI investment and need credible, data-backed documentation to win board approval.

The Process

How We Work

1

Discovery

2-week deep dive

We interview key stakeholders, review your tech stack, map your data flows, and audit AI readiness across all departments.

2

Strategy Build

Bespoke roadmap

We build your custom AI roadmap, financial models, opportunity prioritisation matrix, and vendor/tooling recommendations.

3

Delivery & Handover

Board deck + implementation plan

You receive a board-ready presentation, full implementation plan, and advisory handover session to brief your leadership team.

Pricing

Transparent, Fixed Pricing

No retainers. No surprises. Just results.

Starter
Contact Us

One-off project

  • ✓ AI Readiness Audit
  • ✓ 10-page AI strategy report
  • ✓ Priority quick-win identification
  • ✓ 2 x advisory sessions (1hr each)
  • ✓ Written recommendations & next steps
Get Started
MOST POPULAR
Growth
Contact Us

One-off project

  • ✓ Full AI roadmap
  • ✓ ROI model & financial projections
  • ✓ Competitor AI benchmarking
  • ✓ Board-ready presentation deck
  • ✓ 4 x advisory sessions
  • ✓ Full implementation plan handover
  • ✓ 60-day check-in call included
Contact Us
Enterprise
Let's Talk

Custom scope & pricing

  • ✓ Multi-department AI strategy
  • ✓ Change management framework
  • ✓ Ongoing advisory retainer
  • ✓ Dedicated point of contact
Let's Talk

✓ What's included

  • Strategy documentation & reports
  • Advisory sessions (all tiers)
  • ROI modelling (Growth+)
  • Board-ready materials (Growth+)
  • 60-day follow-up (Growth+)
  • Email support throughout engagement

✗ What's not included

  • Software or technology purchases
  • AI tool implementation or development
  • Ongoing retainer support (see Enterprise)
  • Change management execution

Need implementation too? Ask about bundling with our Agentic AI service.

Frequently Asked Questions

The Starter package (AI Readiness Audit) typically completes in 2–3 weeks. The Growth package runs 4–6 weeks from kickoff to board deck delivery. Enterprise engagements are scoped on a project-by-project basis depending on organisational size and complexity.

Not at all. Our AI strategy work is designed for business leaders, not engineers. We translate complex technical concepts into plain-language business decisions, ROI models, and board-ready documentation that any executive can act on.

We work across a broad range of sectors including professional services, financial services, FMCG, retail, healthcare, cybersecurity, and marketing agencies. Our methodology adapts to your sector — we don't apply cookie-cutter frameworks.

Ready to build your AI strategy?

Book a free discovery call and let's map out how AI can create measurable advantage for your business.
